description: Keep your little one comfy and cute with this 3-pack of baby short sleeve bodysuits, perfect for boys or girls. Made from 100% soft cotton, these leotard-style bodysuits are breathable, gentle on delicate skin, and ideal for everyday wear. Featuring convenient snap fastenings for quick nappy changes and a stretchy neckline for easy dressing, they’re a practical must-have for any baby wardrobe.
